element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Starting weapon with chip power-up system
Eight distinct weapons with manipulable shot-control functions
Rare power-up providing immediate weapon advancement
Hit penalty: -4 weapon levels; level 0 hit = death
Standard lives system with checkpoint respawn
Convertible lives allowing exact-location respawn with no progress loss
Environmental hazard: ship crushed between scrolling objects and screen edge
8 distinct boss fights with difficulty scaling across normal/hard/very hard/hardest modes
Scoring-focused segments with remixed music tracks

typical_tension_triggers: Weapon level degradation after hit (-4 levels)
Dense bullet patterns in later levels
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Vertical shmup with escalating intensity per-level; boss fights punctuate sustained enemy gauntlets; checkpoint system allows incremental tension release; difficulty curve adjustable across four difficulty modes

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Bonus stages (levels 3, 6, 9, 10) offer scoring emphasis branches

difficulty_curve.early_game: Level 1-2: Basic weapon fundamentals, single-enemy introduction, chip collection mechanics teaching level progression system
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Levels 3-6: Weapon switching necessity introduced; screen-crushing hazards appear; enemy density increases; bonus stages offer scoring challenges
difficulty_curve.late_game: Levels 7-8: Dense bullet patterns; complex boss AI; multiple enemy reinforcements; mode-7 graphical variety showcasing SNES capabilities
notable_spikes: First boss encounter (initial damage penalty shock: -4 levels per hit)
Introduction of screen-crushing environmental hazards (mid-game spatial complexity)
Levels 7-8 enemy density and boss reinforcement waves (late-game difficulty ceiling)
Scaling difficulty across Normal/Hard/Very Hard/Hardest modes (post-game challenge

notable_level_patterns.description: Enemy waves escalating in density; weapon power-up chips distributed; screen scrolling with environmental obstacles; boss encounter at level terminus
Emphasizes point accumulation over survival; remixed music track; high enemy density optimized for chaining kills; shorter duration than standard levels

Levels 7-8 introduce reinforcement calls from deepest space; multiple boss phases; dense bullet patterns requiring weapon-switching tactics; difficulty modes unlock extended endings in Japanese version
